_comment: SYNTHETIC, public-formulary-shaped fixture for SPEC-0001 (R10). Stands in for a published Medicare Part D formulary + coverage criteria. No PHI. Shapes the JSON API Request agent path; the HTML twin (formulary-part-d.html) shapes the LLM Parse Website path. Prices are illustrative benchmark figures, not a real price for any product.
benchmarkBasis: neutral public reference band (NADAC / Cost Plus style)

drugs.name: Adalimumab

exceptionWhen: documented inadequate response to a preferred conventional systemic agent
documented intolerance/contraindication to a preferred agent

requires: BSA >= 10% OR PASI >= 12 OR involvement of a sensitive area
trial-and-failure or intolerance of at least one preferred conventional systemic therapy
no active serious infection; latent TB screening performed

drugs.rulingGuidance: approve when the prior-auth criteria and a valid step-therapy exception are documented; need_more_evidence when documentation is incomplete; deny when a preferred agent has not been tried and no exception applies.
